steps.t: Viznak wants you to bring the tale and news of the king's story to Irsinith, the Warden of the Mother Tree in Adagím.
Irsinith, inspired by your story, will commune with the Mother Tree. While she does, she asks that you visit her father and mother at Sul Madásh.
Irsinith, inspired by your story, will commune with the Mother Tree. You have spoken with Irsinith's father. He asked that you speak with her mother b…
